block_02: As the IQ Option Affiliate Program is being outsourced and is ready to be moved to Affstore, you’ll be getting access to more offers from many high-converting trading brands. The offers you previously worked with will still be available to you and you can continue working with them in accordance with the Affstore T&C.
block_03: However, due to strict European regulation, the rates for EEA traffic have changed and the Affstore offer – IQ Option Europe will only be based on a CPA model, paying up to $250 for every client who made a targeted action on the platform. The Revenue share model will not be available for this offer anymore. Due to regulation, dynamic rates are not available in Europe.
block_04: Don’t worry – you will continue generating profits from your old users based on the Revenue share model with no changes. The CPA model will only be applicable to any new users from Europe that you bring.
block_05: Thank you for your understanding and we hope to continue seeing all the impressive affiliate work you put in! 🌟
